channel.title: +MT on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on Vishvas's notes

item.title: The successors of the kaunteya-s in the national memory of bhArata-s and bhoTa-s and related discursions
item.description: Source: here. …. -۩۞۩-۩۞۩-۩۞۩- Indic vs Han influence Western presentation Now we shall take a detour into the history of a neighboring nation, which shares close cultural links with our own, that in recent times has been blithely swallowed by Han imperialism. Indeed, as though to mirror the obliteration of this nation from the maps of the world, a certain strand of modern white Tibetologists tend to attribute greater than observed roles for the Han in the emergence of the Tibetan civilization.
